case_title: WESTERN STATES OFFICE AND PROFESSIONAL EMPLOYEES VS. BAY AREA LONGSHOREMEN'S MEMORIAL ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESTERN STATES OFFICE AND PROFESSIONAL EMPLOYEES PENSION FUND AS TO DEFENDANT BAY AREA LONGSHOREMEN'S MEMORIAL ASSOCIATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WESTERN STATES OFFICE AND PROFESSIONAL EMPLOYEES PENSION FUND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAY AREA LONGSHOREMEN'S MEMORIAL ASSOCIATION $12,886.35 PRINCIPAL, $71.89 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,328.24, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
